description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding cabinet with a beige frame and light tan panels, featuring a symmetrical design. The front side has two vertical doors with small round knobs, suggesting access to internal storage. One side panel is plain, while the opposite side panel is divided into two sections, one of which is black, possibly indicating a decorative or functional feature. The cabinet stands on a slightly raised base and has a flat top surface suitable for placing objects. The overall construction appears to be wood or wood composite, with a smooth, matte finish and no visible glass panels. The design is simple and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or garages.
description: A beige, freestanding cabinet with two front doors, small round knobs, and a flat top, featuring a simple, functional design with one black accent panel.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a plain beige panel with a rectangular frame.
description_view_1: The back of the cabinet, featuring two vertical beige panels and a distinctive black panel on the lower left.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet, similar to the left, with a plain beige panel and rectangular framing.
description_view_3: The front of the cabinet, displaying two vertical doors with small round knobs, indicating access to the interior.
